ztpki_page.title: ZTPKI Certificate Manager
ztpki_page.subtitle: List, search and revoke certificates from Venafi Zero Touch PKI. Authenticate with your HAWK credential — it is used only to sign requests server-side and is never stored.
ztpki_page.creds_note: Your HAWK ID and secret are used server-side only to sign each request (HMAC-SHA256) and are never stored or logged.
ztpki_page.need_creds: Enter your HAWK ID and secret first.
ztpki_page.cn_hint: Use * as a wildcard (e.g. *.dominio.com) — matched against CN and SANs, filtered in the browser.
ztpki_page.wildcard_truncated: (scan limit reached — narrow the filter, there may be more)
ztpki_page.revoke_warning: Revocation is permanent and cannot be undone. The certificate will be published as revoked on the CRL/OCSP.
ztpki_page.recent_hint: Enter your HAWK credentials and click Load (or run a search).
ztpki_page.recent_empty: No certificates issued in the last 24 hours.
